description: Sensor outputs — continuous stream of environmental signals, anomalies, trends
purpose: Append-only signal stream from automated sensors to enable continuous monitoring and Re-Discovery

schema.project_id: string - FK → L26/projects (optional, null for workspace-level signals)
schema.signal_type: enum - anomaly | trend | threshold_breach | opportunity | risk_indicator | status_change
schema.severity: enum - CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW | INFO
schema.title: string
schema.recommended_action: string - what to do about this signal

immutability: APPEND-ONLY, HIGH-VOLUME - Signals are never updated. Only new ones written. Retention policy: 90 days active, then archive. Primary candidate for infrastructure separation (separate signal_store container).
notes: High-volume stream (can be thousands/day). Should be partitioned by sensor_id for performance. TTL enforcement optional.
